llm.objective: Act as a coordinator. Explore live operational state, create or update at least one active thread, and log at least one usability feedback item using action=feedback.
Act as an orchestrator. Inspect events/threads/inbox surfaces, identify one potential risk or dispatch opportunity, and record at least one feedback note via action=feedback.
Act as a worker. Pick an active thread, gather context, and post at least one actor_statement or message_posted event with clear provenance.
Act as a reviewer. Audit recent activity, inspect artifacts/events, and publish one review-style event or recommendation; include one feedback action if UX friction appears.
